artPrompt: A frozen moment of triumph as a winning hand sweeps a glowing pile of dice and hot-gold treasure across a carnival table, snatching the prize while shadowy losers recoil into the smoky black. Lurid neon and ember sparks haze the tattered striped tent behind. Kinetic, theatrical film-still framing of a rigged victory at the midway, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Winner Takes the Snack
text: Each player rolls a six-sided die. The highest roller wins the wager: they gain control of the table snack and draw a card. If you are the highest roller (or tied for it), you also create two Treasure tokens. Ties are broken in favor of the house, obviously.
flavorText: The pot was always just a bag of chips. Magic is about stakes that matter.
